title: My Routines
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
noRoutines: You don't have any routines yet
createFirst: Create your first routine to get started
name: Routine name
volumeReference: Reference ranges based on Israetel et al. (Renaissance Periodization) and Schoenfeld et al. (2017)

newFlow.title: New routine
newFlow.createManuallyDesc: Design your routine step by step
newFlow.createWithAIDesc: Generate a personalized routine with AI

day.title: Day {{number}}
day.name: Day name
day.deleteConfirm: Delete this day and all its exercises?
day.noDays: No days in this routine yet
day.noDaysHint: Start by adding your first workout day

exercise.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: Slow eccentric, pause at bottom...

superset.title: Superset
superset.description: Exercises in the same superset are done without rest between them

templates.title: Predefined routines
templates.description: Proven routine templates for different goals
templates.selectHint: Select a routine. You can customize it later.

full-body-2.name: Full Body 2 days
full-body-2.description: Full body twice a week. Minimum time, essential basics.

full-body.name: Full Body
full-body.description: Full body three days a week. Great to get started.

ppl-3.name: Push Pull Legs (3 days)
ppl-3.description: Push / pull / legs once a week. A solid step up from full body.

upper-lower.name: Upper / Lower
upper-lower.description: 4 days split into upper and lower body. Balanced volume and recovery.

531.name: 5/3/1 Wendler
531.description: Progressive strength, 4 days (5/3/1 method + BBB). Slow, steady progress.

weider-5.name: Weider Split (5 days)
weider-5.description: One muscle group per day. Highest training frequency and per-group volume.

ppl.name: Push Pull Legs (PPL)
ppl.description: 6 days push/pull/legs twice a week. Maximum volume for hypertrophy.

home-bodyweight.name: At home (bodyweight)
home-bodyweight.description: No gym equipment. Full body with your own bodyweight, 3 days a week.

strength-5x5.name: Strength 5x5
strength-5x5.description: Beginner strength with 5x5 on the basics, 3 days and linear progression.

strength-hf.name: High-frequency strength
strength-hf.description: Advanced strength across 5 days, with rotating focus on the heavy basics plus accessories.

endurance-circuit.name: Endurance (circuit)
endurance-circuit.description: Full-body circuit with high reps and short rest, 3 days. Muscular endurance.

home-dumbbell.name: At home with dumbbells
home-dumbbell.description: Full body with dumbbells only, 3 days. For a home gym.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Answer a few quick questions and we'll set up a routine ready to train.
onboarding.recommendedSubtitle: Picked from your answers. You can swap it or customize it later.
onboarding.daysNote: This routine has {{actual}} days and you picked {{requested}}. You can change the days whenever you want.

chatbot.title: Create with AI
chatbot.description: Generate a personalized routine based on your goals and preferences
chatbot.copyInstructions: Copy the prompt and paste it into your favorite AI chatbot
chatbot.promptInstructions: Copy this prompt and paste it into ChatGPT, Claude, or another AI chatbot
chatbot.notesPlaceholder: Prefer to avoid deadlifts due to lower back issues
chatbot.pasteInstructions: Paste the prompt you just copied into your favorite chatbot. When the AI returns the result, copy it and paste it below.

adapt.title: Adapt routine with AI
adapt.step1Desc: Copy your current routine as text. It can be from:
step1Sources: A message or email from your trainer
adapt.step2Desc: This prompt tells the AI how to convert your routine to the correct format:
adapt.step3Desc: Copy the result the AI returned and paste it below.

import.fromFileDesc: Import a file exported from this app or a compatible one
import.pasteTextDesc: Paste the content of a routine file in a compatible format
import.pasteContent: If you have a routine exported from this app or a compatible one, paste the content here.
import.fromExternalDesc: Have a routine in PDF, notes, or any format? AI will adapt it to the app
import.fileInstructions: Select a file exported from this app or a compatible one.
